title: MaxRealism
description: Vanilla is dead. Welcome to reality.
body:
![Oak Log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb93aaaf163a6cdb55c759aad0b6d0121ec9f46a_0.webp)
### MaxRealism: Vanilla is dead. Welcome to reality.

_NOTE: This page contains the 512x resolution. Higher resolutions available on [Patreon](https://patreon.com/nerdgirl_art)_

**⚠️Work in Progress:⚠️** This pack, MaxRealism, is still in the works. Most blocks are still using their vanilla textures. Further updates will be available as time goes on.

**Brutal Realism:** Forget the plain and simple textures of vanilla Minecraft. MaxRealism doesn’t just “enhance” vanilla, it obliterates it. Every texture is designed with reality not only in mind, but slapping you in the face with it. Everything has been rebuilt from the ground up to create a lifelike experience.

**Obsessive Detail:** From the sharp edges of the Deepslate to the aged grain of Warped Planks, MaxRealism is crafted with insane attention to real-world textures.

**No Nostalgia, No Compromise:** This isn’t your cozy texture pack. MaxRealism ditches nostalgia in favor of raw, unadulterated immersion.

**Next-Level Visuals:** Whether you're building on servers or cave diving in survival, MaxRealism turns every scene into a high-fidelity visual experience. Screenshots look like pictures. Gameplay feels like a cinematic.
